notes: First audit pass focused on mushroom records carrying contradictory edible/poisonous signals in shipped data.
Clears misuse of non_edible_severity where positive edibility labels had been stored in a danger field.
Leaves true poisoning / danger records intact.

records.edibility_detail: Edible with caution after thorough cooking, but some people still react badly. Old, waterlogged, or undercooked mushrooms raise the risk.
Edible young only. Use only tender margins; mature brackets become tough and fibrous.
Choice only when the classic firm white-orange aborted form is fresh, solid, and correctly identified.
Edible, but quality drops fast with age. Best when young, firm, and not bug-ridden.
Choice edible when fresh and white. Overripe specimens yellow, soften, and lose quality.
Choice edible when still white and tender.
